mapper.select: SELECT d.id, 'drama' as type, d.name as title, d.cover, d.view_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `like` WHERE target_type = 'drama' AND target_id = d.id ) as like_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE target_type = 'drama' AND target_id = d.id ) as favorite_count FROM drama d WHERE d.status = 1 ORDER BY (d.view_count + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `like` WHERE target_type = 'drama' AND target_id = d.id) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE target_type = 'drama' AND target_id = d.id) ) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT n.id, 'news' as type, n.title, n.cover, n.view_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `like` WHERE target_type = 'news' AND target_id = n.id ) as like_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE target_type = 'news' AND target_id = n.id ) as favorite_count FROM news n WHERE n.status = 1 ORDER BY (n.view_count + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `like` WHERE target_type = 'news' AND target_id = n.id) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE target_type = 'news' AND target_id = n.id) ) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT a.id, 'actor' as type, a.name as title, a.avatar as cover, a.view_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `like` WHERE target_type = 'actor' AND target_id = a.id ) as like_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE target_type = 'actor' AND target_id = a.id ) as favorite_count FROM actor a WHERE a.status = 1 ORDER BY (a.view_count + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `like` WHERE target_type = 'actor' AND target_id = a.id) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE target_type = 'actor' AND target_id = a.id) ) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT user_id, target_type, target_id, 1 as weight FROM browse_history UNION ALL
SELECT user_id, target_type, target_id, 3 as weight FROM `like` UNION ALL
SELECT user_id, target_type, target_id, 5 as weight FROM favorite

SELECT DISTINCT target_type, target_id FROM browse_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT DISTINCT target_type, target_id FROM `like` WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT DISTINCT target_type, target_id FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId}
